tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]

Well the ([ch]G[/ch])truth, Well it ([ch]C[/ch])hurts to say 
I’m gonna ([ch]G[/ch])pack up my bags and I’m ([ch]C[/ch])gonna go away
I’m gonna ([ch]G[/ch])split I can’t ([ch]C[/ch])stand it
I’m gonna ([ch]G[/ch])give it up and quit aint ([ch]C[/ch])never comin back
Broke up be([ch]G[/ch])fore I get to go and I ([ch]C[/ch])got to say
I ([ch]G[/ch])know you used to love me but ([ch]C[/ch])that was yesterday
And the ([ch]G[/ch])truth I wont ([ch]C[/ch])fight it
When the ([ch]G[/ch])love starts burnin you ([ch]C[/ch])got to do whats right


[Chorus]

Woah ([ch]G[/ch])Lover, lover lover, you don’t treat me no ([ch]C[/ch])good no more
Woah ([ch]G[/ch])Lover, lover lover, you don’t treat me no ([ch]C[/ch])good no more


[Verse 2]

Well the ([ch]G[/ch])truth, Well it ([ch]C[/ch])hurts to say 
I’m gonna ([ch]G[/ch])pack up my bags and I’m ([ch]C[/ch])gonna go away
I’m gonna ([ch]G[/ch])split I can’t ([ch]C[/ch])stand it
I’m gonna ([ch]G[/ch])give it up and quit aint ([ch]C[/ch])never comin back
Broke up be([ch]G[/ch])fore I get to go and I ([ch]C[/ch])got to say
There was a ([ch]G[/ch])time oh woman when you ([ch]C[/ch])used to shake it for me
([ch]G[/ch])Now all you do is ([ch]C[/ch])treat me cold
Aint gonna ([ch]G[/ch])take it no more gonna ([ch]C[/ch])walk out the door


[Chorus]

Woah ([ch]G[/ch])Lover, lover lover, you don’t treat me no ([ch]C[/ch])good no more
Woah ([ch]G[/ch])Lover, lover lover, you don’t treat me no ([ch]C[/ch])good no more


[Bridge]

Well I ([ch]G[/ch])went with you on a starry night and I’m ([ch]C[/ch])hurtin too bad cause you don’t treat me right
Oh ([ch]G[/ch])woman oh woman you know I love you so ([ch]C[/ch])mean to me baby I’m walkin out the door


[Chorus]
(same as above)

Woah Lover, lover lover, you don’t treat me no good no more
Woah Lover, lover lover, you don’t treat me no good no more

I ([ch]G[/ch])know you used to love me in every way but know im ([ch]C[/ch])givin up and I’m tired of crying babe
I can’t ([ch]G[/ch])stand it no longer it hurts me to say I’m ([ch]C[/ch])packin up my bags and I’m goin far away


[Outro]
(same as chorus)

Woah Lover, lover lover, you don’t treat me no good no more
Woah Lover, lover lover, you don’t treat me no good no more
Woah Lover, lover lover, you don’t treat me no good no more
Woah Lover, lover lover, you don’t treat me no good no more
